evals.prompt: I need cert security scan for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the cert-security-scanner skill for this cert security scanner request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects cert-security-scanner for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_scan_cert_security.

Keeps the response focused on scanning for certificate-specific security issues (18 checks from CERT-001 to CERT-018), checking for weak signatures, short keys, hostname mismatches, distrusted CAs, or compliance violations.

evals.prompt: Scan example.com for certificate-specific problems like weak signatures, short keys, hostname mismatches, and distrusted issuers.
evals.expected_output: Use the cert-security-scanner skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects cert-security-scanner instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
